---
description: "Refine Lab2 MVC UI to dark automotive style (black nav, orange accents, strong hero) using ux-paperwork rules."
---

Task: Improve the current MVC UI for Lab2 with the project UX direction.

Project context:
- Domain: car workshop ordering system.
- Required pages: Index + Details for all entities.
- Data source: static/mock in-memory repository.
- No CRUD forms in this lab.

Use ux-paperwork style:
- dark automotive hero visual identity,
- black top nav with orange active/accent states,
- uppercase bold title treatment on home/landing,
- compact CTA buttons and icon-supported navigation,
- complete navigation and breadcrumbs,
- strong list/detail readability,
- responsive behavior for mobile and desktop.

Before finishing, confirm:
- all pages remain route-accessible,
- links between related entities are present,
- CSS does not regress contrast/readability,
- output is clearly not default Bootstrap scaffold.
